blocks.text: 24hr rolling window mini-ticker statistics for all symbols. These are NOT the statistics of the UTC day, but a 24hr rolling window from requestTime to 24hrs before. Note that only tickers that have changed will be present in the array.

[
{
"e": "24hrMiniTicker", // Event type
"E": 123456789, // Event time
"s": "BTCUSDT", // Symbol
"c": "0.0025", // Close price
"o": "0.0010", // Open price
"h": "0.0025", // High price
"l": "0.0010", // Low price
"v": "10000", // Total traded base asset volume
"q": "18" // Total traded quote asset volume
}
]
